Lines.FullText: Strictly assign a specified set of permissions for a given group. This method allows only the specified

Brief.RawText:
* @brief Strictly assign a specified set of permissions for a given group. This method allows only the specified
     * permissions and will not inherit any permissions from the parent object for the group, even if the inherit flag is enabled.

Elements.RawText: Allow a specified set of permissions for a given group. If the inherit flag is enabled, this method will

Lines.FullText: allow both the specified permissions and any permissions already allowed for the group on the parent component.

Elements.RawText: allow both the specified permissions and any permissions already allowed for the group on the parent component.

Lines.FullText: Denied permissions will always overrule allowed permissions.

Elements.RawText: Denied permissions will always overrule allowed permissions.

Brief.RawText:
* @brief Allow a specified set of permissions for a given group. If the inherit flag is enabled, this method will
     * allow both the specified permissions and any permissions already allowed for the group on the parent component.
     * Denied permissions will always overrule allowed permissions.

Lines.FullText: Denied permissions will always overrule allowed permissions.

Elements.RawText: Denied permissions will always overrule allowed permissions.
